message:
fix(core): support complex expressions in HAVING aggregate arguments

compute_having_aggregate previously returned NULL for aggregate functions
with non-column-ref arguments (e.g. sum(CASE WHEN val > 10 THEN 1 ELSE
0 END)).  Now evaluates the expression per row in the group before
aggregating.

Also adds 8 new conformance tests: LEFT JOIN null aggregation, LIMIT
edge cases, HAVING with multiple aggregates, unicode strings, INSERT
column reorder, HAVING subquery, complex WHERE, NULL function edges.

Core: 1697 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
